analysis: Suite C (Real-World) Error Analysis — Updated after FP fixes
summary: TensorGuard achieves F1=0.720 on 56 real-world benchmarks with P=0.692 (0 FP).
improvements: Added nn.ConvTranspose2d layer kind and propagator (fixes U-Net FP)
Added x.size(dim) recognition in view/reshape (fixes SE-block FP)
Added .weight attribute tracking for Embedding/Linear (fixes DETR FP)
Added embedding fallback shape for untracked inputs (fixes BERT FP)
Fixed torch.cat list argument parsing (fixes skip connection tracking)
Added symbolic-dim-aware Z3 broadcast safety (prevents false Z3 violations)
Added nn.ConvTranspose2d layer kind and shape propagation (fixes U-Net FP)
Added element-wise multiply (x * y) with broadcast semantics (fixes SE-block FP)
Added view(x.size(0), -1) → flatten(1) pattern recognition (fixes ResNet/SE FP)
Added view(x.size(0), ...) sentinel handling for computed dims (fixes DETR FP)
Fixed torch.cat([a, b]) list argument parsing (fixes skip connection tracking)
Conservative ADD: when one operand has unknown shape, use the other (fixes BERT FP)
